rules: same topology -> same canonical representation -> same topology hash -> same containment identity
undeclared root mutation surface -> containment evidence -> PREO validity NULL -> merge legitimacy NULL
bypass-capable root authority -> ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_RISK -> containment required -> merge legitimacy NULL
deployment-token authority -> declared presence and scope assumption only -> no secret value inspection
workflow_dispatch -> trigger evidence only -> authority→compile→validate→execute→proof still required
Wrangler/local deploy capability -> root authority surface -> containment required when outside governed workflow
containment evidence may invalidate legitimacy but may NEVER authorize merge
